vol_description: This folder contains videos of infant-mother and infant-father play at home at 9, 18, and 24 months of age. These videos come from a larger NIH-funded longitudinal intervention study on low-income families (i.e., Baby Books 2 project) owned by Drs. Natasha Cabrera and Stephanie Reich. Data analysis of these videos is funded by NICHD grant #1R03HD105225-01A1.
